name: Allied Cash Advance
description_short: Allied Cash Advance offers installment loans, cash advances, and prepaid cards at physical locations and online. Fast funding available same-day in-store or next business day online.
description_long:
Allied Cash Advance is a retail lending company operating physical store locations, including one in Mesa, Arizona at 2706 East University Drive. The company specializes in short-term consumer lending products designed for immediate cash needs and emergency expenses. They have established operations across multiple states with a online presence and phone support infrastructure.

The company's primary offerings include installment loans (unsecured personal loans repaid on a fixed schedule), cash advances, retail remote refinancing and reloading of existing loans, and Netspend Prepaid Mastercard® accounts. Their installment loans are marketed for major purchases, bill consolidation, and unexpected larger expenses. Loan amounts and terms appear customizable based on individual underwriting, with funding available as quickly as 30 minutes for in-store applications using debit card deposits, or the next business day for online applications.

Allied Cash Advance distinguishes itself through same-day funding capability at physical locations, a streamlined application process requiring basic documentation (ID, proof of income, active bank account), and stated flexibility regarding credit history—they review applications regardless of credit score rather than automatically declining poor-credit applicants. Their Mesa location maintains extended hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturday) and maintains a high Google rating (4.9 stars across 379 reviews), with customer testimonials emphasizing staff professionalism and service speed.

However, as an emergency-cash lender, Allied Cash Advance operates in a high-cost lending space. The website does not transparently disclose APR rates, fees, or repayment terms upfront, which is standard concern for installment and cash advance products. Borrowers should verify actual costs before accepting loan terms. The company's reliance on collateral (vehicle proof required in Arizona) and requirement for active bank accounts may limit access for unbanked consumers.
address: 140 E Deuce of Clubs Ste B, Show Low, AZ 85901

company_info.headquarters: 140 E Deuce of Clubs Ste B, Show Low, AZ 85901

pros: Same-day funding available in-store (as quickly as 30 minutes with debit card deposit)
Next business day funding for online applications
High customer satisfaction rating (4.9/5 stars from 379 Google reviews)
No automatic credit rejection—applications reviewed even with bad or no credit history
Extended store hours (opens 10am, until 6pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturday)
Multiple application methods: in-store, online, and over-the-phone where available
Retail loan refinancing and reloading available for existing customers
cons: APR rates and fee structures not disclosed on website—actual loan costs unclear before application
Requires active checking account for at least 30 days (excludes unbanked consumers)
Arizona customers must provide vehicle ownership proof as collateral requirement
Website states system maintenance issues affecting access to full product details
Installment loans and cash advances typically carry high interest costs in this lending category
best_for: Consumers needing cash within hours for emergencies or unexpected expenses
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans
Arizona residents who can document income and maintain an active bank account
Existing customers seeking to refinance or reload current loans quickly
diagnosis: Allied Cash Advance is designed for consumers in immediate financial emergencies who need cash within hours and cannot access traditional bank loans due to credit history or banking status. The main caveat is that actual loan costs (APR, fees, total repayment amounts) are not disclosed upfront on their website—borrowers must apply or contact the store directly to understand the true cost before committing, and rates in this category are typically very high.
services: Installment loans (unsecured personal loans with fixed repayment schedules)
Same-day in-store funding (via debit card deposits)
Online loan applications with next-business-day funding
Phone-based loan applications and customer service
Retail remote reloans and refinancing for existing customers
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard® (reloadable prepaid debit card)
